review: These ivory taper candles were exactly the warm tone I wanted for the reception tables. They burned evenly all the way through dinner and the unscented wax meant nothing competed with the floral centerpieces.

The blush table runners arrived pressed and ready to lay out. The fabric has a lovely weight that drapes beautifully over our farm tables, and the color matched my swatch perfectly. Guests kept asking where I found them.
Beautiful hand-lettered welcome sign. The calligraphy is crisp and the wood backing feels substantial rather than flimsy. It set the tone right at the entrance and photographed wonderfully.
Solid floral foam blocks that soaked up water quickly and held my arrangements firmly through the whole event. Knocking off a star only because two arrived a little crumbled at the corners.
Ordered these mini honey jars as favors for a 120-guest wedding and they were a hit. The labels were neat, the seals were tight, and not a single one leaked in transit.
This silk ribbon is gorgeous. The dusty sage shade is true to the photos and it ties such soft, full bows. I used it on the bouquets and the chair backs and it has become a staple for my couples.
Lovely deckled-edge place cards with just the right tooth for fountain-pen ink. No feathering at all when our calligrapher addressed them, and they were packaged flat so none arrived bent.
Came back for more of the taper candles after my first order. Same consistent quality and the same warm white glow. These are now my go-to for every tablescape I style.
Second order of runners and they are just as beautiful as the first. The shop even tucked in a handwritten thank-you note, and the color held up across the entire head table.
Another welcome sign, this time for a winter wedding, and again it was flawless. The lettering is elegant and the finish resists fingerprints. My clients always want to take it home afterward.
Good quality floral wire and tape that did the job for boutonnieres and cascading arrangements. Shipping ran a touch longer than I expected for an event on a tight timeline, hence four stars.
These favor boxes are sturdy and assemble in seconds. I filled them with sugared almonds for a reception and they looked so polished lined up on the gift table. Highly recommend.
Reordered the tapers yet again, easily the most reliable candle shop I have found. Even burn, no drips on my linens, and they ship fast enough to handle last-minute timeline changes.
The napkins are beautiful and hemmed so neatly. They washed and pressed easily for reuse, which matters when you style as many events as I do, and the color range is wonderful.
Velvet ribbon in the most luxurious deep plum. I tied bows on the menu cards and they held their shape all evening. The width was perfect and the spool had plenty to spare.
Pretty escort cards on nice thick stock. One small note: the white read a touch warmer on screen, so it leaned slightly ivory next to my crisp linens. Still lovely and worth it.
Ordered an extra set of runners on short notice and they arrived in time for the rehearsal. Same beautiful drape and color as always. This shop has never let me down.
These floral picks and water tubes kept my stems fresh from setup through the last dance. Discreet, reusable, and exactly the small detail that makes a big difference in the final look.
Lovely organza favor bags. The drawstrings pull smoothly and the stitching is tidy. I filled them with lavender sachets and the whole gift table smelled wonderful.
Beautiful little favor tags, and the twine they came with saved me a trip to the craft store. They tied onto my jars perfectly and added just the right rustic-elegant touch.
